business.name: Sanford and Associates LLC
business.tagline: Montgomery's roof crew you can count on

hero.headline: The roof crew Montgomery *trusts most*
hero.subheadline: Same-day starts, one-day finishes, and crews that clean up like they were never there.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every roof, handled right
services_section.subheading: From storm damage to full replacements — we show up ready

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.description: Complete tear-off and install. We work fast, clean up completely, and leave you with a roof that lasts.

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Tornado, hail, wind damage — we've seen it all. Fast response to get your home protected again.

services.title: Leak Repairs
services.description: Find it, fix it, done. No guessing, no callbacks — we handle the problem and the source.

services.title: Chimney Work
services.description: Flashing, caps, and leak prevention. The details that keep water out for good.

about.heading: Montgomery roofers who answer the phone
about.body: We're the crew your neighbors call first. Real people, real trucks, and we finish what we start.

reviews.name: Natalie S.
reviews.text: Excellent work at a fair price. Their crew finished our roof in one day and cleaned up perfectly. The owners were helpful throughout the entire process.

reviews.name: Margaret C.
reviews.text: After the tornado damage, I got estimates from four companies. Sanford had the best price and worked with my insurance. Professional from start to finish.

reviews.name: Quintez P.
reviews.text: Very pleased with today's work! Even handled a last-minute patio roofing addition. Crew showed up early, worked hard, left no trace they were here.

cta.heading: Ready to get your roof handled right?
cta.body: Free estimates, honest pricing, and crews that show up when we say we will. Call today.
